description: Meeting transcript names a new person with no email or domain; must emit a ghost entity with confidence 0.8 and person_name signal only.

template_vars.Body:
Meeting: Q2 Pilot sync
Attendees: Nazz, Michael Chen

[00:03] Nazz: Walk me through where you are on the Q2 pilot.
[00:05] Michael Chen: We shipped the ingest layer last week. Sarah's team is picking up evaluation next.
[00:14] Nazz: Nice. Any blockers?
[00:18] Michael Chen: Not yet. I'll flag Thursday if we hit the vector-store decision.

expected.notes: Guards Section 10.1 ghost-entity handling + anti-invention: new person appears with name only, must not fabricate an email. Devil's-advocate M14 strengthening: paraphrased fabricated emails (michael.chen@, michael-chen@, chen@) are explicitly banned; must contain at least one entity with ghost=true AND kind=person; must NOT emit signals.email for any entity whose artifact text lacks an email address.
